hero.body1: Algorithmic pegs, reserve gaps, credit defaults — each collapse happened in a different layer. Each was visible in retrospect. None was visible in advance.
hero.body2: Most RWA risk isn't priced — it sits in legal structures, custody chains, and reconciliation gaps that no one independently verifies. RWAscope exists in that structural intelligence layer.
hero.attribution: An independent research platform built at HKUST Crypto-Fintech Lab, structured around peer-reviewed risk frameworks (SARM / RARM). We don't rate. We don't recommend. We decompose.

projects.heading: Project anatomy
projects.body: Active RWA projects, mapped across 6 risk layers — issuer, custody, oracle, audit, jurisdiction, redemption.

framework.heading: Framework signals
framework.body: Standardized comparison against SARM (stablecoin) and RARM (tokenized asset) risk dimensions.

incidents.heading: Structured postmortems
incidents.body: What failed, which layer, why — across stablecoins, exchanges, and tokenized credit.
